narrative:
Precinct Aurora 6-B (precinct in Portage County) has 870 registered voters, with 55.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.5%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.5 percentage points.
